title: helianthemum salicifolium
intro: Helianthemum salicifolium, also known as Rockrose or Willow-leaf Rockrose, is a low-growing, woody shrub with a sprawling habit. The plant is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum salicifolium include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its versatility and effectiveness.
